entries.desc: Use ticketer.py to Forge a Silver Ticket as Administrator
entries.section: Advanced NTLM Relay Attacks Targeting AD CS
entries.context: relaying a DC's NTLM authentication requires specifying the DomainController template | Preventing RCE with machine account is Windows security feature - machine accounts are restricted from performing remote administration tasks, even on themselves. That's why the rpc_s_access_denied error appears with smbexec if you tried to use this hash directly. Instead we need to create a silver ticket.  |
